# Phase 3 Task 7: Implement Unit Tests

## Context and Objective

This task implements comprehensive unit tests for the merge logic phase of the CBD Calendar of Activities & Actions project. The tests must cover all merge logic functionality including normalization, ranking, ambiguity handling, merging, output generation, and summary creation to ensure reliability and maintainability.

The goal is to create unit tests covering "exact decision match, doc token match, title+date match, ambiguity case" and all other critical merge scenarios to provide confidence in the merge system's correctness and robustness.

## Task Description

Implement comprehensive unit tests for all Phase 3 merge logic in `test/unit/merge-logic.test.ts`:

1. **Normalization Helper Tests**
   - Test all normalization functions with various input scenarios
   - Cover edge cases, malformed data, and unicode handling
   - Validate deterministic behavior and error resilience

2. **Ranking System Tests**
   - Test exact decision matches (highest priority)
   - Test document token matches (medium priority)
   - Test title+date matches (lowest priority)
   - Test scoring consistency and accuracy

3. **Ambiguity Detection Tests**
   - Test multiple strong matches (ambiguous)
   - Test single clear winner (not ambiguous)
   - Test no good matches (unmerged)
   - Test edge cases and configuration variations

4. **End-to-End Integration Tests**
   - Test complete merge workflow with real data samples
   - Test performance with larger datasets
   - Test error handling and recovery scenarios

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Unit tests cover exact decision match scenarios with 100 point scores
- [ ] Unit tests cover document token match scenarios with 80-89 point scores  
- [ ] Unit tests cover title+date match scenarios with variable scores
- [ ] Unit tests cover ambiguity cases with multiple similar-scoring candidates
- [ ] All normalization helper functions have comprehensive test coverage
- [ ] All ranking and scoring functions have comprehensive test coverage
- [ ] All merge production functions have comprehensive test coverage
- [ ] All file output and mirroring functions have comprehensive test coverage
- [ ] Tests use real data samples from `shared/data/2024-12-01.md`
- [ ] Tests achieve >95% code coverage for all merge logic
- [ ] Tests run quickly (<5 seconds total) and can be run frequently
- [ ] Tests are deterministic and reliable (no flaky tests)
- [ ] Code follows project testing standards and best practices

## Implementation Guidelines

### Test File Structure
```
test/unit/
├── merge-logic.test.ts          # Main integration tests
├── normalization.test.ts        # Normalization helper tests
├── ranking-system.test.ts       # Ranking and scoring tests
├── ambiguity-handling.test.ts   # Ambiguity detection tests
├── merge-production.test.ts     # Merge creation tests
├── file-output.test.ts          # File I/O tests
├── public-mirroring.test.ts     # Public sync tests
└── count-summary.test.ts        # Summary generation tests
```

### Test Data Setup
```typescript
// test/fixtures/merge-test-data.ts
export const sampleIndexRecords: IndexRecord[] = [
  {
    title: "Nomination of Experts for AHSTAG on the Global Report",
    copDecision: "16/32",
    startDate: "2025-03-05",
    endDate: "2025-04-11",
    associatedBody: "SBSTTA",
    schema: "meetings"
  },
  // ... more realistic test data
];

export const sampleMdRecords: MdRecord[] = [
  {
    Title: "Nomination of Experts for AHSTAG on the Global Report",
    COPDecision: "16/32", 
    Startdate: "5-Mar-25",
    Enddate: "11-Apr-25",
    Associatedbody: "SBSTTA",
    Action_Required_by_Parties: "Y"
  },
  // ... more realistic test data
];
```

### Core Test Scenarios

**1. Exact Decision Match Tests:**
```typescript
describe('Exact Decision Matches', () => {
  it('should score 100 for perfect COP decision match', () => {
    const indexRecord = { copDecision: "16/32", title: "Test Activity" };
    const mdRecord = { COPDecision: "16/32", Title: "Test Activity" };
    
    const score = scoreRecordMatch(indexRecord, mdRecord, normalizedIndex, normalizedMd);
    
    expect(score.total).toBe(100);
    expect(score.reason).toContain('exact decision match');
    expect(score.confidence).toBe('high');
  });
});
```

**2. Document Token Match Tests:**
```typescript
describe('Document Token Matches', () => {
  it('should score 89 for exact related document match', () => {
    const indexRecord = { relatedDocs: "NTF 2025-024" };
    const mdRecord = { Related_documents: "NTF 2025-024" };
    
    const score = scoreRecordMatch(indexRecord, mdRecord, normalizedIndex, normalizedMd);
    
    expect(score.total).toBe(89);
    expect(score.reason).toContain('document token match');
  });
});
```

**3. Title+Date Match Tests:**
```typescript
describe('Title and Date Matches', () => {
  it('should score appropriately for high title similarity with date overlap', () => {
    const indexRecord = { 
      title: "Workshop on Forest Biodiversity",
      startDate: "2025-08-26",
      endDate: "2025-08-28"
    };
    const mdRecord = { 
      Title: "Global Workshop on Forest Ecosystem Restoration",
      Startdate: "26-Aug-25",
      Enddate: "28-Aug-25"
    };
    
    const score = scoreRecordMatch(indexRecord, mdRecord, normalizedIndex, normalizedMd);
    
    expect(score.total).toBeGreaterThan(60);
    expect(score.total).toBeLessThan(70);
    expect(score.reason).toContain('title and date');
  });
});
```

**4. Ambiguity Case Tests:**
```typescript
describe('Ambiguity Detection', () => {
  it('should detect ambiguity when multiple records score similarly', () => {
    const indexRecord = { title: "Biodiversity Workshop" };
    const candidates = [
      { Title: "Biodiversity Workshop on Climate", /* score: 65 */ },
      { Title: "Workshop on Biodiversity Assessment", /* score: 63 */ },
      { Title: "Regional Biodiversity Workshop", /* score: 64 */ }
    ];
    
    const analysis = detectAmbiguousMatches(matchResults);
    
    expect(analysis.isAmbiguous).toBe(true);
    expect(analysis.reason).toContain('multiple similar scores');
    expect(analysis.recommendation).toBe('manual_review');
  });
});
```

## Test Strategy

### Test Categories

**1. Unit Tests (Fast, Isolated)**
- Individual function testing
- Pure function validation
- Error condition handling
- Edge case coverage

**2. Integration Tests (Medium Speed)**
- Multi-function workflows
- Real data processing
- File I/O operations
- Performance validation

**3. End-to-End Tests (Slower, Comprehensive)**
- Complete merge workflows
- Large dataset processing
- Error recovery scenarios
- Performance benchmarks

### Test Data Sources

**Real Data Samples:**
- Extract test cases from `shared/data/2024-12-01.md`
- Create representative subsets for different scenarios
- Maintain data privacy while ensuring realistic testing

**Synthetic Data:**
- Generate edge cases not found in real data
- Create stress test scenarios
- Build specific test cases for each function

### Performance Testing

**Benchmarks:**
```typescript
describe('Performance Benchmarks', () => {
  it('should process 1000 records in under 5 seconds', async () => {
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const result = await processMergeQueue(largeDataset);
    const endTime = Date.now();
    
    expect(endTime - startTime).toBeLessThan(5000);
    expect(result.summary.recordsPerSecond).toBeGreaterThan(200);
  });
});
```

## Test Implementation Requirements

### Mock Data and Fixtures
- Create realistic test data based on actual CBD records
- Build reusable fixtures for common test scenarios
- Ensure test data covers all field variations and edge cases

### Error Simulation
- Test network failures for file operations
- Test malformed JSON and data corruption
- Test resource constraints (memory, disk space)
- Test concurrent access scenarios

### Test Utilities
```typescript
// test/utils/test-helpers.ts
export function createMockIndexRecord(overrides?: Partial<IndexRecord>): IndexRecord {
  return {
    title: "Default Test Title",
    copDecision: "16/32",
    startDate: "2025-01-01",
    ...overrides
  };
}

export function assertMergeResultValid(result: MergeResult): void {
  expect(result.merged.length + result.unmergedIndex.length + result.unmergedActions.length)
    .toBeGreaterThan(0);
  expect(result.summary.totalIndex).toBe(result.merged.length + result.unmergedIndex.length);
}
```

## Dependencies and Prerequisites

- **Vitest Testing Framework**: Configured and ready for unit testing
- **Test Data**: Real data samples from `shared/data/2024-12-01.md`
- **All Phase 3 Tasks**: Tasks 0-6 must be implemented before comprehensive testing
- **Mock Utilities**: For simulating file I/O and external dependencies

## Implementation Steps

1. **Setup Test Infrastructure**:
   - Configure test data fixtures and utilities
   - Setup mock functions for file I/O operations
   - Create helper functions for common test scenarios

2. **Implement Core Function Tests**:
   - Test normalization helpers thoroughly
   - Test ranking and scoring functions
   - Test ambiguity detection logic

3. **Implement Integration Tests**:
   - Test complete merge workflows
   - Test file output and mirroring
   - Test error handling and edge cases

4. **Add Performance and Stress Tests**:
   - Test with large datasets
   - Benchmark critical performance paths
   - Validate memory usage and resource management

## Quality Assurance

### Coverage Requirements
- **Function Coverage**: 100% of public functions tested
- **Branch Coverage**: >95% of code branches tested
- **Line Coverage**: >95% of lines executed in tests
- **Edge Case Coverage**: All identified edge cases tested

### Test Quality Metrics
- **Test Reliability**: 0% flaky test rate
- **Test Speed**: All unit tests complete in <5 seconds
- **Test Maintainability**: Tests are readable and well-documented
- **Test Coverage**: Critical merge logic has 100% coverage

## Additional Information Needed

To enhance task accuracy, the following additional information would be helpful:

1. **Performance Benchmarks**: Specific performance requirements for merge operations
2. **Test Data Volume**: How much test data to generate for comprehensive coverage
3. **Error Scenarios**: Complete list of error conditions to test
4. **Integration Points**: External dependencies that need mocking
5. **Regression Testing**: Historical bugs or issues to prevent
6. **Test Environment**: Special testing environment requirements or constraints
